prompt: App icon for an AI image viewer called ImageView. Ultra-minimalistic. Pure black #08080c background. A small cluster of 7-9 dots in green #9ece6a and blue #7aa2f7, arranged like a UMAP embedding scatter plot — dots closer together in organic clusters with a few outliers. The dots vary slightly in size (4-8px). Nothing else — no text, no border, no grid, no decorative elements. Just dots in space, like a constellation. The arrangement should feel like data points clustering by similarity. Must be recognizable at 16x16px.
